faqs.question: What qualifies as a pest control emergency in Washington Heights?
faqs.answer: A pest emergency includes situations like bed bug infestations, large rodent sightings, wasp nests near entryways, severe cockroach outbreaks, or any pest problem that poses immediate health or safety risks. We respond 24/7 to all emergency calls in Washington Heights, typically arriving within 1-2 hours.

faqs.answer: Yes, all our emergency pest control services come with a satisfaction guarantee.
